users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage personnel access and roles.
users.confirm-deactivate: Are you sure you want to deactivate this user?
users.confirm-activate: Are you sure you want to re-activate the current user?

divisions.title: Divisions
divisions.subtitle: Operational units and functional departments.
divisions.confirm-deactivate: Are you sure you want to deactivate this division?
divisions.confirm-activate: Are you sure you want to re-activate the current division?
divisions.reassign-manager-description: will immediately remove the current manager's access to this office.
divisions.assign-division-description: links a manager to this office, enabling it to perform operations of that division type.
divisions.disabling-division: disabling this assignment will prevent this office from performing all operations of this division type.
divisions.no-offices-assigned-description: Use the "Assign Office" button above to get started
divisions.disabling-manager: if this user manages a division here, disabling will also deactivate that division's assignment.
divisions.disabling-user-operations-warning: disabling this link prevents the division from performing all operations at this office.

offices.title: Global Offices
offices.subtitle: Manage your international real estate footprint and operational hubs.
offices.confirm-deactivate: Are you sure you want to deactivate this office?
offices.confirm-activate: Are you sure you want to re-activate the current office?
offices.assign-first-user: Use the "Assign Employee" button above to get started
offices.assign-division: Use the "Assign Division" button above to get started
offices.assign-office-description: grants the user access to its operations and data.
offices.assign-office-division: Assigning an office to this division
offices.assign-office-division-description: requires a manager and enables division operations from that location.

templates.title: Template Library
templates.subtitle: Manage and organize all form templates across divisions.
templates.no-templates-description: Create your first template to start digitalizing your documentation process.
templates.archive-confirm-description: This template will be archived and no longer available for new operations. You can restore it later if needed.
templates.delete-confirm-description: This action cannot be undone. The template will be permanently deleted only if it has no linked operations and no submitted form instances.
templates.confirm-delete-version: Are you sure you want to remove the latest un-published version?

export-layout.title: Export Layout Designer
export-layout.error-load-description: The template may have been deleted or you don't have access.
export-layout.header-hint: Click the header zone on the paper to edit text directly.
export-layout.page-numbers-hint: "Page 1 of N" appears in the footer zone.
export-layout.footer-hint: Click the footer zone on the paper to edit text directly.

pwa.new-content: New content available, click on reload button to update.

login.toast-error-description: Sorry but we weren't able to find any users with those credentials.

operations.configure-subtitle: Set up the basic information for your operational blueprint.
operations.management-description: Create and manage operational workflows with customizable steps and visual flow builders.
operations.feature-flow-builder: Visual flow builder with drag-and-drop step connections
operations.feature-step-config: Support for blocking and required step configurations
operations.feature-file-templates: Attach file templates to individual workflow steps
operations.feature-global-type: Global and other operation type classification
operations.max-global-label: Max Times Linkable to a Global Operation
operations.max-global-hint: How many times this operation can be linked to a global operation.
operations.prerequisites-description: Select which other operation blueprints must be completed before this global operation can be requested.
operations.prerequisites-placeholder: Select all the other operations as pre-requisites
operations.select-blueprint-subtitle: Choose an operation blueprint and office to start working.
operations.instance-title-placeholder: Give this instance a unique name...
operations.no-blueprints-hint: Create and publish operation blueprints first.
operations.missing-values: Some values are missing. Either the blueprint or the office.
operations.prerequisites-requirement-hint: This global operation requires completed instances of the following types. Select one per requirement.

steps.notification-hint: Comma-separated values. Each person will appear as a checkbox item when the step is active.
steps.blocking-hint: Next step can't start until this completes
steps.upload-docs-hint: Users can upload documents in this step
steps.expected-docs-hint: Comma-separated values. Each document will appear as a checkbox item when the step is active.
steps.allow-link-hint: User can choose to link this step to an existing instance or proceed without linking
steps.allowed-types-hint: Leave empty to allow all operation types
steps.delete-confirm: This will remove the step and all its connections. This action cannot be undone.

workspace.title: My Workspace
workspace.subtitle: Track and manage your operation instances across all workflows.
workspace.select-blueprint-subtitle: Choose an operation blueprint and office to start working.
workspace.no-blueprints-hint: Create and publish operation blueprints first.
workspace.instance-title-placeholder: Give this instance a unique name...
workspace.prerequisites-description: This global operation requires completed instances of the following types. Select one per requirement.
workspace.missing-values-error: Some values are missing. Either the blueprint or the office.

properties.title: Properties
properties.subtitle: Modify specific information of a component.
properties.select-field: Select a field on the canvas to configure it.
properties.placeholder-hint: Add any description for this field
properties.help-text-placeholder: Guidance text shown below the field
properties.multiple-selection-hint: Allow selecting more than one option
properties.required-docs-hint: List of documents the user must upload.

canvas.tip-slash: Type "/" in a text block to add a new block
canvas.tip-at: Type "@" to insert a field token
canvas.tip-grid: Use the ⊞ icon on a row to split into 2-4 columns
canvas.tip-page-numbers: Enable Page Numbers in Document Settings → Footer
canvas.drag-move-block: Drag to move block to another cell
canvas.document-empty-hint: Pick a template to get started, or add a block manually
canvas.layout-issues-suffix: no longer resolve in this template version. Fix or clear them before saving.
canvas.template-header-body-desc: A heading row followed by a text block
canvas.template-two-column-desc: A row split into two equal columns
canvas.template-blank-desc: Start with a single empty text block

section.no-fields-hint: Click a component from the left panel to add one

roles-labels.subtitle: Define which permissions each role has
